dosing_bands.duration_note: Based on cefoperazone component; 7-14 days depending on infection
dosing_bands.notes: Dose based on cefoperazone component. 40-80 mg/kg/day (cefoperazone) in 2 divided doses for neonates. IV preferred.

dosing_bands.duration_note: 7-14 days; may extend for severe infections
dosing_bands.notes: Dose based on cefoperazone component: 40-80 mg/kg/day in 2-3 divided doses. Severe infections up to 160 mg/kg/day in 2-4 divided doses (ICU setting). Max 4 g/day cefoperazone.

dosing_bands.duration_note: 7-14 days
dosing_bands.notes: Dose based on cefoperazone component: 1-2 g BD. Severe: up to 4 g/day in divided doses.

renal_bands.adjusted_dose_note: Sulbactam dose adjustment required (renally excreted); max sulbactam 2 g/day

hepatic_note: Cefoperazone is hepatically cleared; reduce dose in severe hepatic impairment. Max 2 g/day cefoperazone in combined hepatorenal impairment.

interactions.effect: Disulfiram-like reaction (cefoperazone has MTT side chain)
Cefoperazone may cause hypoprothrombinemia — monitor PT/INR
Physical incompatibility — do not mix in same IV line; synergistic antibacterial effect

monitoring_parameters: PT/INR (cefoperazone may cause vitamin K deficiency)
black_box_warnings: May cause vitamin K-dependent coagulopathy — consider vitamin K supplementation
Disulfiram-like reaction with alcohol
pediatric_specific_warnings: Vitamin K supplementation recommended with prolonged use
Monitor for C. difficile-associated diarrhea
IV route preferred for severe infections

administration.reconstitution: Reconstitute with sterile water or NS
administration.dilution: Further dilute in 50-100 mL NS or D5W for intermittent infusion
administration.infusion_rate_note: Infuse over 15-30 minutes; direct IV push over 3-5 minutes for lower doses
administration.compatibility_note: Do not mix with aminoglycosides in same solution
administration.storage: Reconstituted solution stable 24 hours at room temperature

administration.reconstitution: Reconstitute with lidocaine 2% for IM injection

storage_instructions: Store dry powder below 25°C. Protect from light. Reconstituted solution: use within 24 hours.
lactation_note: Small amounts in breast milk; generally compatible

unlicensed_note: Licensed for children >= 2 months. Well-established in pediatric practice.

formulations.indian_conc_note: Cefpodoxime proxetil 50 mg per 5 mL (dry syrup for reconstitution)

dosing_bands.duration_note: AOM: 5 days; pharyngitis: 5-10 days; UTI: 7-14 days
dosing_bands.notes: 5 mg/kg/dose BD for infants >= 2 months. Give with food (increases absorption). Shake suspension well. Use 50 mg/5 mL formulation.

dosing_bands.indication: Acute otitis media / pharyngitis / sinusitis / UTI
dosing_bands.duration_note: AOM: 5 days; pharyngitis: 5-10 days; sinusitis: 10-14 days; UTI: 7-14 days
dosing_bands.notes: 5 mg/kg/dose BD. Max 200 mg/dose, 400 mg/day. Give with food. For older children who can swallow tablets, use 100 mg or 200 mg tablets.

dosing_bands.indication: Acute otitis media / pharyngitis / sinusitis / UTI / pneumonia
dosing_bands.duration_note: 5-14 days depending on infection
dosing_bands.notes: 100-200 mg BD with food. Pharyngitis: 100 mg BD x 5-10 days. AOM: 200 mg BD x 5 days. UTI: 100 mg BD x 7-14 days.

renal_bands.adjusted_dose_note: Extend interval to 24 hours (once daily dosing) in severe renal impairment

interactions.effect: Reduced cefpodoxime absorption — give 2 hours apart
Increased cefpodoxime levels (reduced renal tubular secretion)
Additive nephrotoxicity risk — monitor renal function

monitoring_parameters: Stool for C. difficile if diarrhea
pediatric_specific_warnings: Give with food for better absorption (bioavailability increases by 50%)
Reconstituted suspension stable for 14 days refrigerated
Second-line antibiotic — use amoxicillin first where appropriate
Monitor for antibiotic-associated diarrhea

administration.reconstitution: Add specified volume of cooled boiled water; shake vigorously
administration.storage: Reconstituted suspension: refrigerate (2-8°C), use within 14 days

food_instructions: Take with food — absorption significantly increased
storage_instructions: Dry powder: store below 25°C. Reconstituted suspension: refrigerate at 2-8°C, discard after 14 days.
lactation_note: Excreted in breast milk in small amounts; generally compatible
